# clerk_organization_settings (Resource)

Manages organization settings for a Clerk instance. This is a singleton resource — only one can exist per Clerk application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "clerk_organization_settings" "this" {
  enabled              = true
  admin_delete_enabled = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether organizations are enabled for this instance.

### Optional

- `admin_delete_enabled` (Boolean) Whether administrators can delete organizations.
- `domains_enabled` (Boolean) Whether domain-based organization enrollment is enabled.
- `max_allowed_memberships` (Number) Default maximum number of memberships allowed per organization.

### Read-Only

- `creator_role` (String) The role assigned to the creator of a new organization.
- `domains_default_role` (String) Default role for users added via domain enrollment.
- `id` (String) Synthetic identifier for this singleton resource.
- `max_allowed_permissions` (Number) Maximum number of permissions allowed per organization.
- `max_allowed_roles` (Number) Maximum number of roles allowed per organization.
